headlines.description: Brian Brobbey and Cody Gakpo scored two each as Netherlands cruised to a 5-1 World Cup victory over Sweden to go top of Group F.
headlines.shortLinkText: Netherlands thump Sweden 5-1 in statement win

headlines.description: A brace by substitute Deniz Undav fired Germany to a last-gasp 2-1 win over Ivory Coast to secure their place in the last 32 of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Undav goal earns Germany win vs. Ivory Coast
